rules: No 'Inter' or generic sans for headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' to provide architectural structure and enterprise authority.
Never center-align dense data, metrics, or paragraphs. Left-align for scannability and readability.
Use tight line-height (leading-none or leading-tight) for headings, loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
NO GRADIENTS whatsoever. Rely on flat, solid surfaces to communicate 'data-forward' truth.
Primary color (#1A7A3C) is strictly reserved for CTAs, active states, and key data points. Limit global usage to preserve impact.
Hover states must be explicitly defined and guarantee higher contrast.

layout.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. Use gap-6 or gap-8 between grid items.

grid.mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
grid.desktop: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Every pixel utilized. h-full on children.

layout.radius: rounded-lg (8px maximum) across the entire system. Sharp, enterprise, technical.

navigation.desktop: Left sidebar (w-64), sticky/fixed, pure white bg, right border 1px solid #1A7A3C/10.
navigation.mobile: Bottom navigation bar, fixed bottom-0, z-50, crystal glass effect (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md) with border-t.

cards.style: Flat solid surfaces. Background: #F0FDF4. Border: 1px solid #1A7A3C/10. No heavy shadows, use shadow-sm at absolute maximum.
cards.rule: Avoid the generic Shadcn 'card' look. Use dense, cardless-feeling rectangles.

risk_gauge.style: SVG Semicircular gauge. Stroke width 12px. Color-coded (Green/Yellow/Red). Large bold metric centered inside.

sensor_grid.style: 2x3 grid (mobile) / 3x2 grid (desktop). Phosphor icons. Focus entirely on the metric value and trend arrow (up/down).

ai_advisory_card.style: Distinctive layout. Use a 1px solid #1A7A3C border or a slightly darker surface (#E6FBF0). No 'AI sparkles' or neon glows. Keep it objective.
ai_advisory_card.typography: Use a subtle monospace tag for 'AI Generated'.

charts.style: Minimal grid lines. No bounding box. Customize tooltips to match #111827 background with white text.

tabs.style: Clean underline tabs or sharp pill toggles. Override Shadcn's fixed heights (h-9 to h-auto).

alerts.list: Chronological. Use a distinct 4px left-border color for severity (Red/Yellow/Orange).
alerts.banner: Sticky bottom banner for active warnings. Needs high contrast.

fab.style: Simulate Alert Button. Fixed bottom-right (above nav on mobile). Primary color background. Drop-shadow.

motion.interactions: Micro-interactions. Hover states: slight lift (-translate-y-[1px]) or subtle border darken.
motion.animations: Pulsing animation (animate-pulse) ONLY for active warning/danger cards. Smooth tab transitions using framer-motion layoutId.

icons.style: Regular weight for body, Duotone for active navigation.

profile_avatar.description: Professional portrait for the user profile avatar in the sidebar/header.

empty_state_bg.description: Grain silo interior. To be used as a heavily faded background texture (opacity-5) for empty states or the Insights section header.

rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs, FAB) MUST include a data-testid attribute.
